title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Cole Medin builds a Jira adapter for Archon that automatically triggers AI-powered bug fixes from Jira tickets, generates pull requests, and posts results back to Jira. The system maintains a dedicated conversation context per ticket to support flexible workflows.
